/home/runner/work/olga_scheduler/.codeql-scratch/dbs/cpp/working/autobuild/bin/c++  -Wall -Wextra -Werror -pedantic -fstrict-aliasing -Wdouble-promotion -Wswitch-enum -Wfloat-equal -Wundef -Wconversion -Wsign-promo -Wsign-conversion -Wcast-align -Wmissing-declarations -Wtype-limits -Wnon-virtual-dtor -Woverloaded-virtual -Wno-attributes -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/test_olga_scheduler_capi.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/test_olga_scheduler_capi.dir/tests/test_olga_scheduler_c.cpp.o -o test_olga_scheduler_capi  lib/libgmock_main.a lib/libgmock.a lib/libgtest.a
